name: Hard Rock Legacy Stadium
description: 65000-seat multi-purpose college football stadium featuring cantilevered roof structure natural grass playing field premium club and suite levels with 4500 club seats and 175 luxury suites full broadcast facilities and connected pedestrian bridge to parking and campus. Primary home venue for University of Miami Hurricanes football program.

name: Hurricane Football Performance Center
description: 180000 sqft state-of-the-art football operations facility including main practice field with synthetic turf practice bubble two auxiliary outdoor practice fields weight room and sports science center film rooms offensive and defensive meeting rooms head coach offices recruiting lounge and player lounge. LEED Gold target.

name: Coral Gables Athlete Village
description: 400-bed athlete dormitory complex comprising four 6-story residential towers with shared dining hall sports medicine and rehabilitation center academic support center team meeting rooms rooftop terraces and resort-style pool deck. Designed to house football basketball and other revenue sport athletes year-round.

name: Hurricane Athletic Administration Tower
description: 12-story 120000 sqft athletic administration office building housing Athletic Director offices development and fundraising staff ticket operations marketing and communications sports information broadcast studio and BOA Club premium event space. Connected to stadium via sky bridge.

name: Stadium District Site & Infrastructure
description: Master site infrastructure package for 42-acre Hard Rock Legacy Complex including mass earthwork and fill 4500-car structured parking garage campus pedestrian spine and plaza stormwater management system potable and fire water mains permanent electrical distribution 5G DAS infrastructure and campus wayfinding.
